positive: A vibrant, highly stylized depiction of a fantastical forest creature, resembling a mystical fox or snow leopard, posed centrally and elegantly. The creature should have a clean, defined silhouette against a subtly contrasting, complementary background of overgrown bioluminescent flora and delicate mist. Use bold, graphic outlines, strong deep emerald and cerulean blue tones, with highlights rendered in metallic gold or copper leaf accents. The composition must be isolated and print-ready, maximizing contrast and visual pop suitable for apparel printing. Studio lighting setup, ultra-detailed, fantasy illustration, vector art quality, centered composition, highly symmetrical.
negative: blurry, grainy, low contrast, watermark, logo, signature, text, writing, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, noise, poor resolution, realistic photograph, messy, dirty
